creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #17)

What's the question exactly?

This still works for me.
I compile it with Poudriere for 13.3, 13.4, 14.1 and 14.2 (all amd64).
I use it on 13.4 (but I've not had the chance to try it on 14.x).

I was not able to reproduce the reported problems; I guess some more info is needed.

Did you try this? Can you report if it works for you?
